Off Calendar Feb-23-2009 Continued To Mar-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER OTIS DAMSLET'S Motion For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandamuc [CCP 1094.5]. Appearances: Otis R. Damslet, Attorney at Law, (415) 553-8946, appearing for Petitioner, and moving party. Counsel is not appearing to argue. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Hearing continued to March 13, 2009. Moving Party to provide courtesy copy of all moving papers and the Administrative Record. (The Court added to its tentative ruling, if the Administrative Record, is not available, counsel to provide, a cover letter indicating the circumstances and explanation of why it is not available.) Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
